channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Iran Threatens to Overshadow Trump-Xi Summit
item.description: The upcoming summit between President Donald Trump and Chinese President Xi Jinping is increasingly being overshadowed by the war in Iran, which is no...

item.title: Iranian Ships Try to Run US Blockade in Gulf of Oman, Find Out That Is a Bad Idea
Tom Homan answers how many more deportations needed to restore country: ‘One hell of a shot’
item.description: Border czar Tom Homan says millions more deportations are needed and expects enforcement numbers to increase despite decreasing border crossings.

item.title: D.C. Circuit Rejects ICE Stay Request
item.description: A federal appeals court on Friday declined to let the Trump administration enforce a seven-day notice rule on members of Congress visiting immigration...
